title: BlockyBeavers
body:
BlockyBeavers is a mod which does one thing: it adds beavers to Minecraft.

![Two beavers in a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9da99a5bf28043cd199f7b2ced5b03312b0a0842_0.webp)

---

Beavers spawn in forests, birch forest, old growth birch forests and taigas in groups of 3-5 animals.

You can breed beavers by feeding them carrots or sticks.

---

When killed, beavers drop raw beaver meat and up to two beaver fur. Raw beaver can be cooked, so that it provides 6 hunger points (3 bars).

![Cooking raw beaver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b9d1d4e854aabb23aa359d088655f962c1b3df.png)

Beaver fur can be used to craft leather. Future crafting recipes for beaver fur are planned.

![Crafting leather from 2 beaver fur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65c51ffa46e2454c71b4fb6adfc56d14915ecf01.png)

---

Have fun with beavers!
